title: CUET PG 2025 Answer Key Released @ exams.nta.ac.in

detail.title: CUET PG 2025 Answer Key Released @ exams.nta.ac.in
detail.short_info: CUET PG 2025 Answer Key Released: The National Testing Agency (NTA) published the CUET PG 2025 answer key on May 06, 2025. Candidates can now access it through the official website exams.nta.ac.in. Check regularly for the latest updates on the CUET PG 2025 answer key and other important announcements.

sections.heading: CUET PG 2025 Answer Key Released @ exams.nta.ac.in

content.text: CUET PG 2025 Answer Key Out! The National Testing Agency (NTA) has officially released the CUET PG 2025 answer key on its website exams.nta.ac.in. Following the conclusion of the exam, candidates had been anticipating the release of the answer key, which serves as a valuable tool to assess their performance and predict their scores ahead of the official results. The CUET PG 2025 holds significant importance for students aiming to secure admission into professional courses across Maharashtra.

The National Testing Agency (NTA) conducted the CUET PG 2025 on March 13, 2025 to April 01, 2025 at various designated centres across the state. The exam took place in online/ offline mode. The official answer key for CUET PG 2025 is released on the official website. We have shared the direct download link for easy access to the CUET PG 2025 answer key.

As per the latest official update, CUET PG 2025 Answer Key has been released on May 06, 2025. All those candidates who have appeared in the above exam can download the answer key from the official website exams.nta.ac.in.

sections.heading: Direct Link to Download the CUET PG 2025 Answer Key

content.text: Candidates who appeared for the CUET PG 2025 can now download the answer key and submit objections, if necessary. To file objections, candidates must log in using their credentials via the link provided on the official website.
CUET PG 2025 Answer Key - Download Here

sections.heading: Steps to Download the CUET PG 2025 Answer Key:

items: Go to the official website exams.nta.ac.in.
Find and click on the link labeled “Answer Key” on the homepage.
Enter the required login details and submit the form.
Download the Final Answer Key PDF to your device.
Download and save it for future reference.
Compare your recorded responses with the answers provided in the key.
